description: Clean up the astronomy observation log by standardizing time formats, populating missing Messier catalog numbers, and calculating average visibility ratings. Identify beginner-friendly objects, sort the data by quality, and generate summary statistics. Save the processed log to /home/ga/Documents/astronomy_log_cleaned.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Clean the astronomy club's star party observation log by standardizing time formats, filling missing Messier numbers using the reference sheet, calculating average quality ratings, marking beginner-friendly objects (quality >= 4.0), sorting by quality, and counting total Messier objects observed.
